text_original: You control the plot. Your imagination is bondless, if you want it to be. Combine "LOTR," with "Orange is the new black," and "Anger Management". It's totally different than the main plot character's and challenges you to think outside the norms and processes.
text_zh: 剧情由你掌控。只要你愿意，你的想象力可以无边无际。你可以将《指环王》、《女子监狱》和《愤怒管理》结合在一起。这与主线剧情的角色完全不同，并挑战你跳出常规与流程去思考。
reply_original: Wow, your creativity is absolutely incredible! Mixing LOTR with Orange is the New Black and Anger Management sounds like an epic, one-of-a-kind adventure. We love how you are pushing the boundaries of the plot and thinking outside the norms. If you ever have more wild ideas or need help, reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 哇，你的创意简直太不可思议了！将《指环王》与《女子监狱》以及《愤怒管理》结合在一起，听起来像是一场史诗般的、独一无二的冒险。我们非常喜欢你突破情节边界、打破常规的思考方式。如果你有更多疯狂的想法或需要帮助，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。玩得开心！
